title: Employee performance
excerpt: Deadline Mode - make sure every board has this enabled on the timeline and date column so that you have a overdue indicator.

posts.author: nickscreacth (nick screacth)
posts.cookedHtml: 1. Deadline Mode - make sure every board has this enabled on the timeline and date column so that you have a overdue indicator.

posts.author: Avo_FluidApps (Avo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @nickscreacth - you might find our new Smart Timeline + Duration app really helpful for managing dates, statuses, reminders, and assignments. It extends the native Timeline and Duration columns in ways that aren’t possible out of the box, all powered through automation, making your workflows way more dynamic and efficient.

Feel free to give it a look, and I’d love to hear your feedback or even walk you through it live if that helps!
